title: pararuellia lowei
intro: Pararuellia lowei is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pararuellia lowei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pararuellia lowei can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in a decoction to create a tea for medicinal purposes.
